node.html: Backend services and event pipelines supporting $1B+ in annual advertising spend and millions of campaign events per day. Built and operated REST APIs, microservices, Kafka and RabbitMQ streams, and cloud-native deployment workflows for near real-time analytics and reporting.

frontmatter.title: Python Automation and Release Validation Framework

node.html: Automation framework covering 200+ API, UI, and integration scenarios to improve regression confidence and release speed. Integrated validation workflows with Jenkins and GitHub Actions, reducing verification time while helping teams identify production and pre-release defects faster.

Full-stack applications and backend services delivered across 20+ client engagements in real estate, healthcare, e-commerce, and financial services. Built REST APIs and automation systems that reduced operational overhead, supported stakeholder workflows, and carried projects from architecture through production support.
